bank_account_group_idUUIDNOT NULLLinks all versions of the same account. New account = new UUID. Amendment = same UUID.
country_codeTEXTNOT NULLAlpha-3 ISO from ID Country picklist (IND, PAK, SAU, LKA)
currency_codeTEXTNOT NULLAuto-set from Currency picklist via ID Country. INR / PKR / SAR / LKR
bank_nameTEXTNOT NULLFrom Bank picklist, parent = country
branch_nameTEXTNULLABLEMandatory IND/LKA, optional PAK/SAU, hidden for others
branch_codeTEXTNULLABLEMandatory LKA only. Hidden for IND, PAK, SAU
account_holder_nameTEXTNOT NULLMandatory all countries
account_numberTEXTNOT NULLStored as TEXT. Mandatory all countries
ifsc_codeTEXTNULLABLEMandatory IND only. Hidden for all others
ibanTEXTNULLABLEMandatory PAK/SAU. Hidden for IND/LKA
swift_bicTEXTNULLABLEOptional all countries
is_primaryBOOLEANNOT NULLDEFAULT false. One primary globally per employee enforced by partial unique index
effective_fromDATENOT NULLAlways 1st of month. CHECK EXTRACT(DAY)=1. New hire: defaults to hire date, read-only
effective_toDATENOT NULLDEFAULT '9999-12-31'. Active = this value. Closed by RPC when new version inserted
created_atTIMESTAMPTZNOT NULLDEFAULT now()
created_byUUIDNOT NULLFK → profiles.id
updated_atTIMESTAMPTZNOT NULLDEFAULT now()
updated_byUUIDNOT NULLFK → profiles.id

employee_bank_attachments

Column Type Nullable Notes
idUUIDNOT NULLPK
bank_account_idUUIDNOT NULLFK → employee_bank_accounts.id ON DELETE CASCADE
employee_idUUIDNOT NULLFK → employees.id — denormalised for RLS efficiency
file_nameTEXTNOT NULLOriginal filename
file_typeTEXTNOT NULLMIME type e.g. application/pdf
file_sizeINTEGERNOT NULLBytes
storage_pathTEXTNOT NULLPath in hr-attachments bucket: bank-accounts/{employee_id}/{group_id}/{filename}
uploaded_byUUIDNOT NULLFK → profiles.id
uploaded_atTIMESTAMPTZNOT NULLDEFAULT now()
is_activeBOOLEANNOT NULLDEFAULT true. Soft-delete attachments without removing storage file

3. Fields & Country Rules

Common Fields — Always Visible, All Countries

Field Behaviour
CountryMandatory. Dropdown from ID Country picklist. Drives bank picklist, field rules, currency lock
CurrencyAuto-set from Currency picklist via ID Country default_currency. Read-only. INR / PKR / SAR / LKR
Primary AccountToggle. One primary globally per employee. Auto-inherited when amending same group
Bank NameMandatory. Picklist filtered by selected country (Bank picklist, parent = country)
Account Holder NameMandatory all countries
Account NumberMandatory all countries. Stored as TEXT
Attachment (Proof)Mandatory everywhere including admin direct-save. Min 1 file required. Same pattern as expense attachments

Country-Variable Fields

Field IN (IND) LK (LKA) PK (PAK) SA (SAU)
Branch Name Mandatory Mandatory Optional Optional
Branch Code — hidden — Mandatory — hidden — — hidden —
IFSC Code Mandatory — hidden — — hidden — — hidden —
IBAN — hidden — — hidden — Mandatory Mandatory
SWIFT / BIC Optional Optional Optional Optional

Field rules are driven by the ID Country picklist ISO code. New countries added to Reference Data automatically appear with default rules (IBAN + SWIFT pattern) — no code changes required.

4. Validations

DB Constraints & Indexes

Rule Implementation
One primary per employeeUNIQUE (employee_id) WHERE is_primary = true AND effective_to = '9999-12-31'
No duplicate active IBANUNIQUE (iban) WHERE effective_to = '9999-12-31' AND iban IS NOT NULL
No duplicate active account numberUNIQUE (country_code, account_number) WHERE effective_to = '9999-12-31'
Effective date orderingCHECK (effective_to >= effective_from)
effective_from always 1stCHECK (EXTRACT(DAY FROM effective_from) = 1)
IFSC required for INDCHECK (country_code != 'IND' OR ifsc_code IS NOT NULL)
Branch Code required for LKACHECK (country_code != 'LKA' OR branch_code IS NOT NULL)
IBAN required for PAK/SAUCHECK (country_code NOT IN ('PAK','SAU') OR iban IS NOT NULL)

Effective Dating Rules (App Level)

Standard Employees
  • On/before 15th → effective_from = current month 1st
  • After 15th → submission blocked with modal message
  • Approver acting after 20th → approval blocked with error
Exceptions — No Date Rules
  • Role: bank_exceptions → can submit any time
  • New hire flow → date rules skipped entirely
  • New hire effective_from → hire date, read-only

Effective Date Chain (RPC Logic)

1. Each account identified by bank_account_group_id — all versions of same account share this UUID
2. "Add New Account" → new group_id, no records closed, multiple active accounts allowed
3. "Update / Amend" existing account → same group_id. RPC sets previous record effective_to = new_effective_from - 1 day, inserts new record with effective_to = '9999-12-31'
4. Primary flag auto-inherited from previous version in same group
5. Both operations are transactional — no window with zero active accounts
User sees: "+ Add Account" button and "Update" button per row — group_id is invisible

5. Reference Data / Picklists

Country dropdown
Reads from ID Country picklist. ISO code (IND/PAK/SAU/LKA) drives field rules. default_currency joined to Currency picklist to resolve currency code.
Bank Name dropdown
New "Bank" picklist category. Parent = country (mirrors ID Type → ID Country). Filtered by selected country. Seeded with top 10 banks per country.
Extensibility: New country → add to ID Country picklist + add banks to Bank picklist with parent = new country → zero code changes required. Default field rules for unknown countries: IBAN + SWIFT/BIC pattern.
